title: [FIRRTL] InferDomains: Partially annotated wires not updated

features.name: FIRRTL domain declaration
features.description: Code should include FIRRTL domain declarations with named domains

features.name: domain-typed module input port
features.description: Code should include a module input port with an explicit domain type annotation
features.snippet:
public module Foo :
  input A : Domain of ClockDomain

features.name: partial domain annotation on wire
features.description: Code should include a wire with a partial domain list annotation that does not cover all inferred domains

features.name: connect to partially domain-annotated wire
features.description: Code should include a connect statement driving a partially domain-annotated wire from a source whose domains are inferred
features.snippet:
wire w : UInt<1> domains [A]
connect w, p
